examples: She poised the javelin in her hand before the throw.
Moses holds out a rod during the battle in order that Israel prevails over her enemies, and Joshua will do the same with a javelin.
Helen is very good at throwing the javelin and Mary is very good at running.
Gloucestershire County Council signed a 25-year contract to build the facility at Javelin Park, in Haresfield.
According to Javelin Research, prepaid use grew 18% in 2011 compared to 2010.
